topic.what: neuro-symbolic RAG framework for phishing detection in privacy-critical domains combining deterministic symbolic analysis with semantic RAG classification and formal ontology reasoning
topic.how: dual-phase pipeline: Phase 1 applies lightweight symbolic rules to email metadata; Phase 2 performs privacy-preserving RAG with automated PII redaction, HNSW vector retrieval from phishing-only corpus, and LLM reasoning conditioned on PhishOnt-inferred attack types
topic.why_matters: healthcare and regulated domains require contradictory constraints: near-zero false positives to prevent workflow disruption, transparent explanations for non-expert staff, HIPAA compliance prohibiting sensitive data transmission, and robustness against AI-generated phishing campaigns

characteristics.what_it_measures: fraction of phishing predictions that are correct
characteristics.context: Conservative FPR-first design choice; DataPhish 2025 achieves 98.2%
Conservative threshold deliberate tradeoff for low FPR; Aggressive mode achieves 44.6% recall while maintaining 99.5% precision

characteristics.what_it_measures: fraction of legitimate emails misclassified as phishing
characteristics.context: 6× lower FPR than TF-IDF with redaction; enables healthcare deployment without workflow disruption

characteristics.what_it_measures: recall improvement of Phase 2 RAG over Phase 1 symbolic-only on AI-generated threats
characteristics.evidence: Section 5.1 DataPhish 2025 evaluation; Phase 2 reaches 99.1% recall
characteristics.context: 78.6-point recall gain on AI-generated threats demonstrating RAG effectiveness against LLM-crafted phishing

characteristics.what_it_measures: harmonic mean of precision and recall
characteristics.context: F1 range 0.976-1.000 across 18 creator sources including human-written, GPT-family, DeepSeek-Chat, Grok, Amazon Nova

characteristics.what_it_measures: percentage of LLM explanation bullets citing verifiable evidence
characteristics.evidence: Table 5A n=60 random test emails with ontology context
characteristics.context: ONTOLOGY-tagged bullets achieve 100% support vs variable heuristic tag rates; demonstrates formal reasoning superiority for audit requirements

characteristics.what_it_measures: return on investment for healthcare deployment
characteristics.evidence: Table 7 healthcare deployment scenario; 10,000 daily emails, 4.4% phishing rate
characteristics.context: $1,506/day operational cost vs $818K daily risk mitigated; optimistic bound; becomes 1,450×/1,437× at 99.1% recall

characteristics.what_it_measures: reduction in sensitive data transmitted to external APIs
characteristics.context: 50.7% of 2,337 test emails contained at least one redacted PII field (mean 1.63 items/email); detection F1 preserved at 0.987 under active masking

characteristics.what_it_measures: Phase 2 RAG recovery rate for phishing emails bypassing Phase 1 symbolic rules
characteristics.evidence: Section 5.1 DataPhish 2025 stratification; 1,264 of 1,589 phishing emails scored zero in Phase 1
characteristics.context: Neutral-tone attacks (95.8% evasion) reach 99.0% recovery; Greed-tone (97.2% evasion) reach 98.2%; demonstrates architectural complementarity
